title: Grit Studio Run Cancel Command Owner
forbids: missing public runInGame.cancel command ownership or cancellation routed around the operation runtime owner
why: Packet 3 makes runInGame.cancel({ requestId }) the single public cancellation command; HTTP abort remains transport behavior.
remediate: Expose cancellation only as runInGame.cancel({ requestId }) and route it through the operation runtime cancellation owner.
message: Run in Game cancellation command ownership drifted from the explicit public cancel command.
